name: @geoalgeria/schema
description: Canonical data contract for GeoAlgeria datasets — TypeScript types, a zero-dependency runtime validator (incl. point-in-wilaya boundary checks + an Algeria-bbox coordinate guard), canonical metadata + manifest (schema.org/DCAT) builders, and CSV/GeoJSON emit helpers. The shared schema every @geoalgeria/* package conforms to.
author: Yasser's Studio (https://yasser.studio)
